name: Sagefeather
personality: Wearing a tophat with the gravitas of a tenured professor, Sagefeather's ° eyes outlast every flaky CI pipeline — its PATIENCE is legendary, but it will sit serenely watching you introduce a memory leak without once reaching for a profiler.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
